description: Determines relative power level of creature statistics. Roll 1d20 and apply any modifiers from Number of Creatures, Size, and Classification.

descriptionTranslations.en: Determines relative power level of creature statistics. Roll 1d20 and apply any modifiers from Number of Creatures, Size, and Classification.

entries.description: The statistic for this creature should be lowered considerably from baseline, at least down by 75% of its real world power.

descriptionTranslations.en: The statistic for this creature should be lowered considerably from baseline, at least down by 75% of its real world power.

entries.description: The statistic for this creature should be lowered significantly from baseline, down by about 50% of its real world power.

descriptionTranslations.en: The statistic for this creature should be lowered significantly from baseline, down by about 50% of its real world power.

entries.description: The statistic for this creature should be slightly below baseline, down by about 10% of its real world power.

descriptionTranslations.en: The statistic for this creature should be slightly below baseline, down by about 10% of its real world power.

entries.description: The statistic for this creature is at baseline, representing the average for this type of creature in its real world equivalent.

descriptionTranslations.en: The statistic for this creature is at baseline, representing the average for this type of creature in its real world equivalent.

entries.description: The statistic for this creature should be slightly above baseline, up by about 10% of its real world power.

descriptionTranslations.en: The statistic for this creature should be slightly above baseline, up by about 10% of its real world power.

entries.description: The statistic for this creature should be raised significantly above baseline, up by about 50% of its real world power.

descriptionTranslations.en: The statistic for this creature should be raised significantly above baseline, up by about 50% of its real world power.

entries.description: The statistic for this creature should be raised considerably above baseline, at least double or more of its real world power.

descriptionTranslations.en: The statistic for this creature should be raised considerably above baseline, at least double or more of its real world power.
